text.content:
Rebuilt to PF2e Treasure-by-Level — the community conversion omits treasure (CHG-0008). Do not restore PF1e gp. Full table & budget check: reports/treasure_report.md.

  • @UUID[Compendium.cotct-pf2e-conversion.cotct-items.Item.b04PLWVkmm3RM4nm]{+1 Dagger (Gaedren's)} — boss loot; first permanent magic weapon.
  • +1 armor potency (Gaedren's '+1 padded') — boss loot (or a level-2 minor item).
  • A14 hoard → a 1st-rank scroll + ~50 gp re-priced gems.
  • @UUID[Compendium.cotct-pf2e-conversion.cotct-items.Item.dK4hnpH7s67RYnNI]{Garnet (Yargin)} (~8 gp) · @UUID[Compendium.cotct-pf2e-conversion.cotct-items.Item.ymuRwMg6WfWIwkne]{Darkwood coffer + vermin repellent} (~12 gp).
  • 2× Acid Flask (lesser) + Thunderstone (Yargin's gear); 3× minor Healing Potion (Giggles); ~30 gp thug coin.
  • @UUID[Compendium.cotct-pf2e-conversion.cotct-items.Item.I7HQNtjI9yPvQ4fA]{Coded ledger} → Guard bounty 15 gp (30 w/ cipher key).

• @UUID[Compendium.cotct-pf2e-conversion.cotct-items.Item.iNQaVcbkSM0VPXsa]{Queen Ileosa's Brooch} — returning it launches the queen's audience (Event 8) → recruitment + the queen's reward parcel (next section). Loot value trivial; narrative value high.
  • @UUID[Compendium.cotct-pf2e-conversion.cotct-items.Item.DPDen8gco6rznX9Y]{Zellara's Harrow Deck} — the recurring Harrow subsystem (CHG-0010); later becomes the Harrow Deck of Many Things (Ch.6).
  • Shiver (in the coffer) — story drug, not loot; destroying it pays off a 'Drug Addict' hook.
